name: Providers
summary: Model/provider adapter contracts, Apple Foundation Models integration, provider router seams, stubs, and capability profiles.
invariants: Providers are infrastructure, not law or clinical authority.
Local Apple Foundation Models use must be explicit and unavailable states must be honest.
Remote fallback is denied unless official policy explicitly enables it.
Stub output must never be persisted as real provider output.
allowedWork: Maintain provider adapter seams, router behavior, stubs, and capability profiles.
Expose provider availability and degradation truth without overclaiming.
Add tests for provider honesty and fail-closed behavior.
Document provider limitations and local-first policy.
forbiddenWork: Use providers as Core, gate, clinical, or regulatory authority.
Persist stub output as real output.
knownGaps: Production provider hardening remains future work.
Remote provider policy remains explicit and constrained by future governance decisions.
notes: Provider work often intersects Session Runtime normalization and MSR stage execution.
Territory records do not authorize network calls or provider credential use.
